title: Junior Prom
overview: A wealthy man's son is running for high school student body president, and the boy's father tells the principal that if his son wins, he will make a sizable donation that will pay for the football team's much-needed uniforms.

trailers.title: Harry the Hipster - Keep the Beat Junior Prom 1946
